sample_questions: Can I reach the place with a normal car? | Do I need a 4x4? | Can transport be arranged from the village? | How rough is the last part of the road?
Can we do horse riding? | What can we do nearby? | Is this area romantic / good for hiking?
Will it be warm enough? | Is firewood included? | What heating is available?
Is there electricity? | Is there hot water? | Is there Wi-Fi or signal? | What kind of toilet is there?
Is it self check-in? | Can we arrive late? | Where is the key box? | Should we arrive before dark?
Is the hot tub included? | How does it heat? | Can we use it in winter? | How long does it take?
Is there a kitchen? | Can we cook inside? | Is there a fridge? | How far is the nearest shop?
Is it still available? | Can more people fit? | Can we bring a dog or child?
Can you discount the stay? | Can we reschedule? | Can we get a refund because the place is too off-grid / snowy / difficult?
Is there a bathroom inside? | Is the toilet private? | How does the off-grid toilet work?
